name: sonovafurn Modular Compression Sofa
short_description: A modular compressed sofa with sculpted volume, boxed delivery, and a layout built for small-space living.
description: Designed for apartments and modern family rooms, this modular compression sofa expands into a lounge-focused silhouette with deep seats, soft edges, and premium everyday comfort.
feature_bullets: Vacuum-compressed sofa in a box for easier delivery
Modular silhouette made for small apartments and media rooms
Soft-touch boucle texture with deep lounge seating

faq.a: No tools are required. Unbox, remove the wrap, and let the modules expand into shape.

faq.q: Is it good for small apartments?
faq.a: Yes. The boxed format is designed for tighter entries, elevators, and upstairs rooms.

faq.q: Can I clean the fabric easily?
faq.a: Spot-clean with a soft cloth and mild upholstery-safe cleanser.
Yes. The foam is engineered to recover shape after transit and setup.
